result.name: Dust of the dreamer
result.description: Level: 1d6 Form: Pouch of very fine, rainbow-hued dust Effect: When sprinkled in the eyes, grants the recipient all the benefits of a ten-hour recovery roll as a single action. This does not use up any of their recovery rolls.

sections.name: Dust of the dreamer
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6

Form: Pouch of very fine, rainbow-hued dust

Effect: When sprinkled in the eyes, grants the recipient all the benefits of a ten-hour recovery roll as a single action. This does not use up any of their recovery rolls.
